# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateAdminReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $post = $_POST;

    $allowedStatuses = ['pending', 'processing', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'failed', 'refunded'];
    $allowedCategories = ['electronics', 'fashion', 'home', 'beauty', 'sports', 'books', 'other'];

    $filters = [];
    $conditions = [];
    $params = [];

    $status = isset($post['status']) ? trim((string)$post['status']) : '';
    $category = isset($post['category']) ? trim((string)$post['category']) : '';
    $dateFrom = isset($post['date_from']) ? trim((string)$post['date_from']) : '';
    $dateTo = isset($post['date_to']) ? trim((string)$post['date_to']) : '';

    if ($status !== '' && $status !== 'all') {
        if (in_array($status, $allowedStatuses, true)) {
            $conditions[] = 'status = :status';
            $params[':status'] = $status;
            $filters['status'] = $status;
        }
    }

    if ($category !== '' && $category !== 'all') {
        if (in_array($category, $allowedCategories, true)) {
            $conditions[] = 'category = :category';
            $params[':category'] = $category;
            $filters['category'] = $category;
        }
    }

    if ($dateFrom !== '') {
        $fromDate = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateFrom);
        if ($fromDate && $fromDate->format('Y-m-d') === $dateFrom) {
            $conditions[] = 'created_at >= :date_from';
            $params[':date_from'] = $dateFrom . ' 00:00:00';
            $filters['date_from'] = $dateFrom;
        }
    }

    if ($dateTo !== '') {
        $toDate = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateTo);
        if ($toDate && $toDate->format('Y-m-d') === $dateTo) {
            $conditions[] = 'created_at <= :date_to';
            $params[':date_to'] = $dateTo . ' 23:59:59';
            $filters['date_to'] = $dateTo;
        }
    }

    $whereSql = '';
    if (!empty($conditions)) {
        $whereSql = ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
    }

    $sql = "
        SELECT
            id,
            customer_name,
            status,
            category,
            amount,
            created_at
        FROM orders
        {$whereSql}
        ORDER BY created_at DESC
    ";

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $stmt->execute();
    $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $summarySql = "
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_records,
            COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount,
            COALESCE(AVG(amount), 0) AS average_amount
        FROM orders
        {$whereSql}
    ";

    $summaryStmt = $pdo->prepare($summarySql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $summaryStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $summaryStmt->execute();
    $summary = $summaryStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $statusBreakdownSql = "
        SELECT
            status,
            COUNT(*) AS total
        FROM orders
        {$whereSql}
        GROUP BY status
        ORDER BY total DESC
    ";

    $statusStmt = $pdo->prepare($statusBreakdownSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $statusStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $statusStmt->execute();
    $statusBreakdown = $statusStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $categoryBreakdownSql = "
        SELECT
            category,
            COUNT(*) AS total
        FROM orders
        {$whereSql}
        GROUP BY category
        ORDER BY total DESC
    ";

    $categoryStmt = $pdo->prepare($categoryBreakdownSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $categoryStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $categoryStmt->execute();
    $categoryBreakdown = $categoryStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    return [
        'filters' => $filters,
        'query' => $sql,
        'params' => $params,
        'summary' => $summary ?: [
            'total_records' => 0,
            'total_amount' => 0,
            'average_amount' => 0,
        ],
        'status_breakdown' => $statusBreakdown,
        'category_breakdown' => $categoryBreakdown,
        'rows' => $rows,
    ];
}
